summary: Homepage navigation validation testing to verify all navigation menu items and call-to-action buttons successfully redirect to their corresponding target pages

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Prenatal Classes menu item in the Classes & Events dropdown successfully navigates to the Prenatal Classes page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "Classes & Events" dropdown menu in the navigation bar
Click the "Prenatal Classes" option in the dropdown menu
validations: The page displays the Prenatal Classes page header
The page content shows information about prenatal classes

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Class Calendar menu item in the Classes & Events dropdown successfully navigates to the Class Calendar page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.

The calendar shows available classes and events
